div1.entryFree: Burst, subst., sudden breaking forth, peal, explosion; used of sounds only: a hollow b. of bellowing, Tp. II, 1, 311. the b. and the ear-deafening voice of the oracle, Wint. III, 1, 8. the instant b. of clamour that she made, Hml. II, 2, 538. --s of horrid thunder, Lr. III, 2, 46. the snatches in his voice, and b. of speaking, Cymb. IV, 2, 106 (his broken and exploding manner of speaking).
